title: Bitter Fish Comfort Bites
description: A unique fusion of bitter and comfort flavors, these bite-sized fish treats will surprise your taste buds.

ingredients.name: Fish Fillets
ingredients.notes: Any firm white fish works well

instructions: Preheat your oil to 350°F (175°C) for frying.
Season fish fillets with salt and pepper.
Dredge fish in flour, shaking off excess.
Dip floured fish in beaten eggs, then coat in crispy breadcrumbs.
Fry fish in hot oil until golden brown and cooked through.
Meanwhile, pan-fry sliced bitter melon until softened.
Assemble comfort bites by placing fried fish on a bed of bitter melon, topping with pickle slices.
